prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. We analyzed DE's historical daily closing prices over the past year (approx. 252 trading days) to estimate its daily drift (mean logarithmic return, µ ≈ 0.0007) and daily volatility (standard deviation of logarithmic returns, σ ≈ 0.0150). Using these parameters, 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations were run over 18 trading days to forecast future prices. The point estimate is the median of these simulations, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated price distribution.
